programme.title: WWE LFG
programme.desc: LFG newcomer Elio LeFleur battles Mike Derudder in an electrifying main event match that sends the crowd into a frenzy—and catches the eye of Shawn Michaels. And can the diminutive Carlee Bright handle the punishment when she goes one-on-one with the intimidating Bayley Humphrey?
